title: Head Coach (amber)
description:
amber, the exciting new sister brand of Amore Fitness, is an upcoming boutique women’s-only group functional training studio in Singapore. The studio is built around high-quality coaching, strong community, and long-term member development. Join us as we take a step towards a new era of fitness in Singapore. 

We are looking for a Head Coach to deliver high-level training as a coach and a leader, develop and execute in-house programs, lead and mentor a team of coaches, and inspire our client community. 

Key Responsibilities: 

Coaching & Programme Leadership

  • Lead the design, delivery, and evolution of the studio’s strength and conditioning programmes 
  • Ensure all programming is safe, progressive, structured, and aligned with long-term member development
  • Coach high-quality group classes and personal training, setting the standard for coaching excellence
  • Maintain consistency in movement standards, class flow, and coaching cues across all sessions

Coach Development & Standards

  • Mentor, train, and develop the coaching team to meet and maintain studio standards
  • Onboard new coaches and ensure they are confident running dual-zone classes independently
  • Conduct regular coach evaluations, feedback sessions, and skills development workshops
  • Establish and maintain coaching SOPs, class templates, and programming guidelines

Member Experience & Education

  • Ensure members feel supported, confident, and engaged during all classes
  • Educate members on training intent, progression, and recovery
  • Support onboarding, assessments, and movement education where required
  • Work closely with the Studio Manager to uphold a premium member experience

Additional Skills

  • Prior experience with studio operations may be considered for a hybrid role (Head Coach & Studio Manager)

Qualifications:

Minimum 3–5 years of coaching experience in functional training, strength & conditioning, CrossFit-style, or boutique fitness environments

  • Proven experience coaching women across different age groups, with a strong applied understanding of female physiology, anatomy and long-term training needs
  • Demonstrated expertise in programme design for diverse populations and fitness levels
  • Prior experience as a Head Coach, Lead Coach, or Senior Coach is strongly preferred

Requirements and Skill Set:

  • Strong technical foundation in strength training, conditioning, and movement mechanics
  • Confident coaching in group and personal training settings
  • Ability to manage dual-zone classes confidently and effectively
  • Excellent communication, organisation, and attention to detail
  • Professional, composed, and leadership-oriented
  • Excellent client management skills 
  • Organized, proactive and comfortable in a fast-paced environment 
  • Willingness to work flexible hours 
  • Assist Studio Manager with daily operations and branch performance. 

What We Offer: 

  • Competitive salary + benefits package 
  • Free gym memberships 
  • Career progression through studio expansions 
  • Access to professional development, education and certifications 
  • Opportunity to be part of a studio from its early growth phase

We offer a competitive salary and benefits package based on merit and professional advantages of a dynamic environment that supports your development and recognizes your achievements.

Interested candidates are welcome to submit a detailed resume. For more information, please visit us at: www.amorefitness.com.

postedCompany.description:
Empowering Women Through Every Stage of Life

Since 1985, Amore Fitness has been Singapore’s leading women-only fitness and wellness brand — dedicated to helping women embrace healthier, stronger, and more confident lives.

From students and young professionals to mothers and seniors, we create a supportive community where women can thrive through every chapter of life.

Amore Fitness – Full-service gyms & studios with a wide range of group classes, from dance-inspired workouts to strength training, designed exclusively for women.
am Pilates – Dedicated reformer Pilates studios that focus on posture, core strength, and mindful movement.
Amore Define – Boutique spas offering rejuvenating treatments that restore balance and wellness.

With over four decades of experience, we remain passionate about blending fitness, wellness, and lifestyle into one holistic journey. Our mission goes beyond workouts — we aim to build a strong community of women who uplift and inspire one another.

👉 Join us as we redefine women’s wellness in Singapore.
Reach out to us at hr@amorefitness.com if you are keen to find out about our current openings!
postedCompany.name: AMORE FITNESS PTE. LTD.
